testcase.name: TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Claude Code Button Removal > should NOT render Claude Code button in header
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Claude Code Button Removal > should only have Refresh button in header actions
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Claude Code State Variables Removal > should not have claudeMessage state affecting component behavior
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Claude Code State Variables Removal > should not have claudeLoading state causing UI loading states
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Claude Code State Variables Removal > should not have showClaudeCode state affecting component structure
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > sendToClaudeCode Function Removal > should not have any function calls to sendToClaudeCode
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > sendToClaudeCode Function Removal > should not respond to Enter key events for Claude Code input
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Claude Code UI Panel Removal > should not render Claude Code interface panel
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Claude Code UI Panel Removal > should not have conditional rendering based on showClaudeCode
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Claude Code UI Panel Removal > should not have chat message history UI
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Console Error Prevention > should not produce console errors related to Claude Code functionality
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Console Error Prevention > should not have undefined function calls related to Claude Code
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Behavior Verification - Component Functionality > should maintain all original functionality without Claude Code features
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Behavior Verification - Component Functionality > should have clean grid layout without Claude Code column
TDD London School: Claude Code Removal from RealSocialMediaFeed > Contract Verification - API Interactions > should only make expected API calls without Claude Code endpoints
